questionHtml: To calculate chi-squared, expected values must first be calculated. Assuming that there is no association between the two species, calculate the expected number of quadrats in which both species would be present, showing your working.
markschemeHtml:
1. 70 × 55150 ;
  2. 25.7;

Award [1] for proper values chosen/equation or [1] for answer.
